item.title: I Checked out 3 ReGLOSS Events
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Secret Adventure" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks "Traveller" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks "Party Time" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks "Goodnight" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw "Moonside Howl" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw Hololive event/collab vlog playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct5KQkT5pLgMt7m4rtRiKcLl
▼Related Videos▼ Visiting the Hololive HoloX Raku Spa Collab: https://youtu.be/5leGB482JsI Visiting the Hololive Gen1 Raku Spa Collab: https://youtu.be/eOvlbB7nbP8
▼Related Links▼ ReGLOSS 「Hour Time Yellow」MV: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TO4W5iUe4Jw ReGLOSS Shibuya Walk (Tsutaya): https://shibuyatsutaya.tsite.jp/article/1486.html ReGLOSS HMV Only Shop: https://www.hmv.co.jp/news/article/250911177/ ReGLOSS Raku Spa: https://rakuspa.com/hololive7/
Timestamps 0:00 - Tsutaya Shibuya walk 3:28 - HMV Exhibition 6:06 - ReGLOSS Raku Spa 11:17 - Goods 14:04 - Final thoughts

item.title: 【福袋】ホロライブ１万円福袋買ってきたら神袋だったわけ
item.author: くーぽん
item.content:encoded:
新年あけおめ！ 遅くなりましたが今年も福袋開けたので見てくれよな！！
使用素材 BGM:DOVA-SYNDROME SE:効果音ラボ ナレーション：VOICEVOX ずんだもん COEIROINK:リリンちゃん
#ホロライブ #hololive #福袋
